title: Purely Lacquered Mediterranean Eggplant Skewers
description: A nutty and tender Mediterranean dish featuring eggplant, perfect for a monsoon evening, this recipe is macrobiotic-friendly and cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer. The lacquer glaze adds a rich and savory flavor to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer by filling it with water and bringing it to a boil.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, lacquer glaze, salt, and black pepper.
Add the eggplant cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the lacquer glaze mixture.
Thread the eggplant cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers in the bamboo steamer and steam for 15 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
You can also serve with a side of quinoa or brown rice for a filling meal.
